phrases.intent_en: Ask where nearest ATM cluster is
phrases.cultural_note: ATM clusters are common near major shopping mall entrances.

likely_response.local: Přímo u hlavního vchodu do IGY.
likely_response.translation_en: Right by the main entrance to IGY.

responses.english: Right by the main entrance to IGY.
responses.french: Přímo u hlavního vchodu do IGY.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if parking meters take cards
phrases.cultural_note: Contactless payment is widely accepted in Czech parking meters.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, all of them take cards.

responses.english: Yes, all of them take cards.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to validate tram ticket
phrases.text_local: Jak se označuje jízdenka na tramvaj?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket inspectors are strict; always validate before boarding or immediately upon entering the tram.

likely_response.translation_en: Insert the ticket into the yellow machine.

responses.english: Insert the ticket into the yellow machine.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where IGY mall entrance is
phrases.cultural_note: Czech directions are often terse and rely on landmarks rather than street names.

likely_response.translation_en: To the left, around the corner.

responses.english: To the left, around the corner.
